data.name: Dreams of Amelia 🔞[ADULT NSFW]
data.detailed_description:
😈 Join the Horde 😈


關於此遊戲

💜 功能 💜

💋 遊戲的目的是透過不同的方式取悅阿米莉亞來滿足她的需求。
💋 每次性行為都涉及各種姿勢、各種動作和各種工具。
💋 親吻、按摩、拍打，當然還有擁抱！ 〜
💋 阿米莉亞擁有超能力。她感覺不到疼痛，也不會受傷。
💋 各種洋裝、衣服和配件。
💋 多種髮型、地點和怪癖
💋 多種相機模式。
💋 可調節的髮色和膚色。
💋 可調節的姿勢和動畫。
💋 解剖布娃娃系統（關節沒有以不應該的方式彎曲）。
💋 一天中的不同時間：夜晚、白天、早晨/晚上。
💋 升級系統可解鎖新的動畫、工具和位置。

💜 概覽 💜

阿米莉亞是一名 21 歲的公司職員。她的興趣和工作領域是 3D 圖形。如果不是因為一個問題，阿米莉亞會是一個非常幸福的人......阿米莉亞非常孤獨，缺乏溫暖...... :( 至少，在你出現之前！〜

阿米莉亞在附近的跳蚤市場買了一本奇怪的書，卻不知道這本書被一個僕人惡魔施了魔法。你就是那個惡魔。

可悲的是，僕人惡魔並不像真正的魔鬼那麼強大。你只擅長做一些小事和照顧主人的房子。但阿米莉亞並不失望——你「提供」的東西正是她「需要」的。

盡力而為！阿米莉亞指望著你，她承諾一旦你讓她夠滿意，她就會釋放你。

data.short_description: 阿米莉亞非常孤獨。在公司工作讓你很少有機會找到男朋友。嘿，阿米莉亞也有她的「需求」！但當她在當地跳蚤市場買了一本舊書時，一切都改變了……書裡有一個惡魔！你就是那個惡魔。讓阿米莉亞的夢想成真！

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0a
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 9c compatible sound card

data.name: Dreams of Amelia 🔞[ADULT NSFW]
data.detailed_description:
😈 Join the Horde 😈


About the Game

💜 FEATURES 💜

💋 Bitter-sweet Story

💋 Sweat, blushing. agitation

💋 The point of the game is to fulfill Amelia's needs by pleasuring her in different ways.

💋 Each sexual action ranges from various positions to various actions with various tools.

💋 Amelia has superpowers. She can't feel pain and cannot be harmed.

💋 Various dresses, clothes, and accessories.

💋 Many camera and lighting modes.

💋 Customisation of booba size,

💋 Oral, anal, and vaginal action

💋 Adjustable hair color & skin tone.

💋 Adjustable poses and animations.

💋 Anatomical ragdoll system (no joints bending the way they are not supposed to).

💋 Different time of Day: Night, Day, Morning/Evening.

💋 Various locations to do lewd.

💜 OVERVIEW 💜

Amelia is a 21-year-old corporate worker. Her passion and field of work is 3d Graphics. And Amelia would be a very happy person if not for one problem... Amelia is terribly lonely and warmth-deprived... :( At least, until you came along!~

Amelia bought a weird book at the nearby flea market, not knowing it was enchanted with a servant demon. YOU are that demon.

Sadly, a servant demon is not as powerful as the TRUE devil. You are only good for some minor chores and taking care of the house of your master. But Amelia is not disappointed - you "offer" just the things she "needs".

Do your best! Amelia is counting on you, and she promised to set you free once you satisfy her enough.

But everything changed when she bought an old book, on the local flea market... with a demon inside! YOU are that demon. Make Dreams of Amelia come true!
